nodes.contents: Calc(select=[session_id, user_id, page_url, referrer, event_type, event_time, user_agent, ip_address])
Sink: FileSystemSink(path=[s3://data-lake/clickstream/raw/], format=[parquet], partitionBy=[DATE(event_time), HOUR(event_time)], rollingPolicy=[size=256MB, interval=10min])
WindowAggregate(window=[TUMBLE(event_time, INTERVAL '1' MINUTE)], groupBy=[page_url], select=[page_url, COUNT(*) AS view_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_visitors, window_start, window_end])
GroupAggregate(groupBy=[user_id], select=[user_id, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count, MAX(event_time) AS last_seen])
Calc(select=[session_id, user_id, page_url, event_time], where=[event_type = 'error' OR event_type = 'exception'])

_comment: LAMBDA ARCHITECTURE: Raw to data lake + real-time page metrics + user activity upsert + error alerts (4 sinks)
